text: I wake up at 6:30 each morning and start my day by drinking a glass of water and stretching for five minutes. After a quick shower, I have a light breakfast, usually oatmeal with fruit. I leave for work at 8:00, where I spend the morning in meetings and the afternoon on focused tasks. After work, I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga at home to stay active. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading, or watching a series. By 10:30, I’m ready for bed. This routine has brought a sense of stability and energy to my life.
